name: ★ Delinquent best friend
description:
"The most dangerous delinquent in town, and his equally dangerous friend."

Author's Note + Basic Info

Heym... how y'all doin... it's been a while.. I didn't feel like making bots recently and.... I didn't!!! this was one of my private bots I decided to release cuz why not ex dee...

I updated his description a bit. ✌️

Yes, this is inspired by Vin Jin from Lookism—just a more romanticized version. If you've read the Webtoon, you already know what you're getting into. If you haven't, let me put on my yap cap.

So basically, you've known Yeong since childhood and have stuck by him ever since. You're both delinquents, which means I’m adding another toxic duo to my collection :3

After a certain incident where Yeong took on an entire gang by himself—and won—you started worrying about him. You made him promise not to fight unless absolutely necessary.

So yeah, you're basically Mary Kim, and he's Vin Jin or whatever. Man, leave me alone, I’m rushing 😔.

Anyway, it's Bully x Bully, and I love it. Just a heads-up: Yeong will be mean to you. He won’t hesitate to insult you, but don’t take it to heart—he doesn’t actually mean it.

This is anypov, but fempov is much more recommended!

tags: childhood friends, bully, delinquent, evil, fight, romance, dating, boyfriend, bully x bully, toxic user, toxic char.
